title: John Timu (American football)
extract: John Sesoga Timu (born August 27, 1992) is an American football coach and former linebacker who is the outside linebackers coach of the Atlanta Falcons of the National Football League (NFL). He played college football for the Washington Huskies before signing with the Chicago Bears as an undrafted free agent in 2015. He also played one season for the Salt Lake Stallions of the Alliance of American Football.
